title: helicia serrata var. oreophila
intro: Helicia serrata var. oreophila, also known as the mountain helicia, is a rare and endemic plant species native to Australia. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial actions. The health benefits of Helicia serrata var. oreophila include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. The plant is typically prepared into a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture for consumption, and may also be applied topically as a poultice or salve for wound healing and skin conditions.
